site.name: Imam Dr. Ahmed Abouseif
site.title: Imam Dr. Ahmed Abouseif - Doctor of Tafsīr & Qur'anic Sciences
site.description: Official website of Imam Dr. Ahmed Mohamed Ali Abouseif, Doctor of Tafsīr and Qur'anic Sciences from Al-Azhar University, holder of connected Qur'anic ijazahs, and Founder and President of the American Imams Academy in Texas.

hero.name: Dr. Ahmed Abouseif
hero.description: Doctorate in Tafsīr and Qur'anic Sciences from Al-Azhar University, holding connected Qur'anic ijazahs (isnād) to the Prophet ﷺ. Former Director of the General Department of Religious Guidance at the Egyptian Ministry of Awqāf. Over three decades of experience in imamate, university teaching, scholarly research, and family counseling across Egypt and the United States.

about.title: Biography
about.subtitle: Scholarly and Da'wah Journey
about.intro: Imam Dr. Ahmed Mohamed Ali Abouseif holds a Ph.D. in Tafsīr and Qur'anic Sciences from Al-Azhar University (2008), along with a Qur'anic ijazah in the recitation of Hafs through the Shāṭibiyyah and Ṭayyibah transmissions, with a connected isnād to the Prophet ﷺ. He is the Founder and President of the American Imams Academy in Plano, Texas (since March 2017), and serves as Imam and Director of Religious Affairs at the Academy's Mosque (since November 2021). His career spans more than three decades across imamate, university teaching, scholarly research, institutional leadership, and media engagement in both Egypt and the United States.
